description: Fig. B.2. Optimal number of rights and sponsor value as a function of the fraction m of unsophisticated investors (panels (a) and (b)) and a mean-preserving spread in payoffs h − l (panels (c) and (d)). Common parameters (unless changed in the above figures) are: μ0 = 0.5, K = 1, h = 12, l = 1, γ = 0.75, and m = 0.8. The value from issuing straight equity is UFNR=5.5 in all panels above.

Fig. B.3. Optimal number of warrants and optimal strike price as a function of the fraction m of unsophisticated investors (panels (a) and (b)) and a mean-preserving spread in payoffs h − l (panels (c) and (d)). Common parameters (unless changed in the above figures) are: μ0 = 0.5, K = 1, h = 12, l = 1, γ = 0.75, and m = 0.8.
